title: Continuation of the National Emergency With Respect to Significant Malicious Cyber-Enabled Activities
summary: A notice from March 24, 2026, declares the continuation of a national emergency concerning significant malicious cyber-enabled activities. This emergency, initially declared on April 1, 2015, addresses the threat posed by cyber activities originating outside the U.S. to national security, foreign policy, and the economy. The notice extends the emergency for one year, citing the ongoing threat and referencing previous executive orders that have taken additional steps to address it.
